title: MEDNET - 211info
text: OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION COOS MEDNET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription assistance to individuals once per calendar year up to $60. 1855 Thomas Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be at or below federal poverty level and have no insurance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 435-7080 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 435-7080 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Copy of original prescription from doctor's office or emergency room must be presented at time of appointment LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the same complex as Coos Health and Wellness and Advanced Health. Services: Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES JUDICIAL SERVICES - COURT APPOINTED SPECIAL ADVOCATES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION COOS
